notes: Compact 340 x 265 battery tray/deck for standard N70/27-class envelope up to 318 x 180 x 230, with removable hold-down slots, low end stops, battery lift-out path, and cable clip holes. Electrical holders mount on the raised front/radiator-side service ladder, not on engine-side panels.

Widened 660 x 310 front/radiator-side access ladder: covered Relay Rev C mounts outside the battery footprint on the outboard/access edge with plastic rear guard/underlay ahead of the folded metal tray, left-side relay power in/out keepouts, top control-cable keepout, separated top-front shelf/base pickups for MIDI plus a side-mounted cutoff/kill-switch card, 80 mm cable gutter, seated MIDI output comb/backplate, enlarged double-wire MIDI output access hole, direct battery-to-relay and battery-to-MIDI feeds, and five heavy MIDI output cables.

Compact formed chassis saddle: nominal 220 x 230 flat pattern with 70 mm near leg, measured rail-top cap nominal 90 mm, and 70 mm far leg. Through-bolt both legs and chassis at the one known pickup location; use crush tubes/spacers where required.
Compact upright bridge side plates from the formed chassis saddle to tray/rail saddle; not a second chassis fixing location.
Battery hold-down crossbar template; final slot spacing follows actual battery and clamp rod positions.

Folded cutoff base/guard: 210 x 150 flat pattern, 170 x 110 finished face, 20 mm lips bent upward around the 100A breaker/terminal side. Open final breaker mounting holes only after the actual cutoff body, stud spacing, reset lever, and cable-lug sweep are measured.
